title: CWJC/455/2023 - Shatrughna Singh  Vs The High Court of Judicature at Patna
text:
IN THE HIGH COURT OF JUDICATURE AT PATNA
Civil Writ Jurisdiction Case No.455 of 2023
======================================================
Shatrughna Singh son of Shri Tapeshwar Singh, Resident of Village and P.O.
Gonhia Chapra, Tahsil/ P.S. Bairia, District Ballia (U.P.), At present Mohalla
Bajrangpuri, P.S. Alamganj, District Patna.
... ... Petitioner/s
Versus
1. The High Court of Judicature at Patna through its Registrar General.
2. The Registrar General High Court of Judicature at Patna. x
3. The State of Bihar, through the Principal Secretary, Department of General
Administration, Patna.
4. The Principal Secretary Department of General Administration Govt. of
Bihar, Old Secretariat, Patna.
5. The Under Secretary-1, Department of General Administration, Govt. of
Bihar, Old Secretariat, Patna.
... ... Respondent/s
======================================================
Appearance :
For the Petitioner/s : Mr.Ratneshwar Prasad, Advocate
For the High Court : Mr. Piyush Lall, Advocate
For the Respondent/s : Mr.Md. Nadim Seraj (GP5)
======================================================
CORAM: HONOURABLE THE ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE
and
HONOURABLE MR. JUSTICE PARTHA SARTHY
ORAL ORDER
(Per: HONOURABLE THE ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE)
15 26-06-2025 Mr. Ratneshwar Prasad, learned Counsel for the
petitioner seeks permission to withdraw this petition.
2. The petition stands dismissed as withdrawn.
(Ashutosh Kumar, ACJ)
(Partha Sarthy, J)
Sujit/-
U
parties: Shatrughna Singh  Vs The High Court of Judicature at Patna
judges: THE ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE,MR. JUSTICE PARTHA SARTHY
